title: Pinned Option on Updated API
excerpt: Would it be possible to add a optional boolean to the create_update API call to mark an update as pinned?

posts.author: adam.s (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml: Would it be possible to add a optional boolean to the create_update API call to mark an update as pinned?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @adam.s

That sounds like a great idea! I’m going to go ahead and pass it along to our development team, as I do think it might be useful to have this option for a wide range of use cases. That said, I’m afraid I am not able to commit to a release date or even a rough ETA just yet, as we’ll need to consider and prioritise this against other tasks in our backlog. I hope that makes sense.

-Alex
